info.name: Dust Workspace API
info.description:
Export workspace analytics and read aggregated workspace usage data.

Contact Support:
 Name: Dust Support

query.description:
(Required) The analytics table to export:
- "usage_metrics": Messages, conversations, and active users over time.
- "active_users": Daily, weekly, and monthly active user counts.
- "source": Message volume by context origin (web, slack, etc.).
- "agents": Top agents by message count.
- "users": Top users by message count.
- "skill_usage": Skill executions and unique users over time.
- "tool_usage": Tool executions and unique users over time.
- "messages": Detailed message-level logs.
(Required) Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format
(Required) End date in YYYY-MM-DD format
IANA timezone name (defaults to UTC)
Output format (defaults to csv)

variable.description: (Required) Unique string identifier for the workspace

request.description: Export analytics data for the workspace identified by {wId} in CSV or JSON format.

response.name: The analytics data in CSV or JSON format

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description:
(Required) The analytics table to export:
- "usage_metrics": Messages, conversations, and active users over time.
- "active_users": Daily, weekly, and monthly active user counts.
- "source": Message volume by context origin (web, slack, etc.).
- "agents": Top agents by message count.
- "users": Top users by message count.
- "skill_usage": Skill executions and unique users over time.
- "tool_usage": Tool executions and unique users over time.
- "messages": Detailed message-level logs.
(Required) Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format
(Required) End date in YYYY-MM-DD format
IANA timezone name (defaults to UTC)
Output format (defaults to csv)
(Required) The start date in YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD format
The end date in YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD format (required when mode is 'range')
(Required) The mode of date range selection
The output format of the data (defaults to 'csv')

(Required) The name of the usage table to retrieve:
- "users": The list of users categorized by their activity level.
- "assistant_messages": The list of messages sent by users including the mentioned agents.
- "builders": The list of builders categorized by their activity level.
- "assistants": The list of workspace agents and their corresponding usage.
- "feedback": The list of feedback given by users on the agent messages.
- "all": A concatenation of all the above tables.
Include users and assistants with zero messages in the export (defaults to false)

variable.description: (Required) Unique string identifier for the workspace

request.description:
Deprecated: this endpoint will be removed after 2026-06-01.
Use GET /api/v1/w/{wId}/analytics/export instead.

Get usage data for the workspace identified by {wId} in CSV or JSON format.

response.name: The usage data in CSV or JSON format, or a ZIP of multiple CSVs if table is equal to "all"

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
